description_en: São Paulo may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 94 halal restaurants and 7 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore São Paulo, Brazil, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to São Paulo: 94+ halal restaurants, 7 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.4/5.
